text.title: python-web-frameworks Output Contract
text.summary: Schema for the decision-record output: chosen framework, triggering rule, and downstream methodologies to load.

example.code: { "framework": "django", "triggered_by_rule": "r1-django-when-admin", "rationale": "Admin/CMS surface is the dominant requirement; the product needs a back-office for content editors and Django admin saves at least a sprint.", "non_functional_drivers": ["built-in admin", "relational ORM coverage", "templated HTML alongside JSON API"], "downstream_methodologies": ["django-models", "django-base-model", "django-api", "django-coding-standards", "django-pytest"], "adr_line": "framework = django" }

example.note: Invalid: framework not in enum; trigger rule not in enum; rationale too short; downstream_methodologies empty; adr_line does not match required pattern.

list.item: Exactly one framework chosen; not "Django + FastAPI" or "depends".
The triggering rule id matches the rationale (don't claim r1 then describe async needs).
Downstream methodologies list is framework-consistent (no `django-*` after `framework = fastapi`).
ADR line is present in `constitution.md` after this methodology runs.
